name: FIND ALL 5: Vikings
short_description: Hey you, warrior! Do you want to go to MeowHalla? Then grab your axe and sail with us to new lands full of glorious battles and rich booty.
detailed_description:
Find All Vikings is an object search game. Start your adventure in the cold fjords and see if you are worthy of Thor's hammer. Look around to see if all your equipment is in place, hoist the sail on your ancestral drakkar and set sail for new lands full of glorious battles. Defeat all your enemies and get a well-deserved reward in the form of glory and riches, or go with honor to the beautiful MeowHalla with other worthy warriors like you!

Game Features:
-1,000 different search items
-Increasing level of difficulty
-There are hints
-Interesting story
-The world is populated by citizens, each with their own story to tell
-Option to choose the desired item to search for
-Interactivity. Items can also be searched for inside houses
-Levels are coloring
- 2.5D effect
-A chance to get into the MeowHalla :)
